title: Turkish Boregi Delight
description: A delicious Turkish boregi pastry filled with a sweet and creamy cacao filling, perfect for dessert.

ingredients.name: Cacao Filling
ingredients.notes: see below for cacao filling recipe

instructions: Roll out the pastry dough to a thickness of about 1/8 inch.
Cut the dough into 4 equal squares.
Place a tablespoon of cacao filling in the center of each square.
Fold the dough over the filling to form a triangle and press the edges to seal.
Brush the tops of the boregi with the softened butter.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until golden brown.
